Function.Inference: Ends with a |: at bar 2, setting up the loop.
The main looping body, ending with a :| at bar 50.

Section.Inference: A short introductory phrase before the loop.
Primary theme introduced with sparse instrumentation.
A direct repeat of the primary theme with a fuller texture.
A contrasting 16-bar section with sustained chords and new melody.
A return of the primary theme.
A syncopated chordal section that transitions back to the loop start.
